SELECT * FROM movie_companies mc WHERE mc.note LIKE '%(Japan)%' AND mc.note NOT LIKE '%(USA)%' AND (mc.note LIKE '%(2006)%'        OR mc.note LIKE '%(2007)%')
wheres: ["mc.note LIKE '%(Japan)%'", "mc.note NOT LIKE '%(USA)%'", "(mc.note LIKE '%(2006)%'        OR mc.note LIKE '%(2007)%')"]

sql: SELECT * FROM name n WHERE n.name LIKE '%Yo%' AND n.name NOT LIKE '%Yu%'
SELECT * FROM role_type rt WHERE rt.role ='actress'
SELECT * FROM title t WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2006  AND  2007 AND (t.title LIKE 'One Piece%'        OR t.title LIKE 'Dragon Ball Z%')
wheres: ['t.production_year BETWEEN 2006  AND  2007', "(t.title LIKE 'One Piece%'        OR t.title LIKE 'Dragon Ball Z%')"]
